text: I am surrounded by glass, modern design, and bold ideas. The emptiness and clarity of the first scene evoke a sense of anticipation, as though knowledge is waiting just beyond those glass doors. Entering the R+D space, I feel the pulse of innovation. The vivid colors and words stir my curiosity, and I sense the energy of creative minds. Here, the meeting of intellect and invention inspires awe and a subtle invitation—to question, to learn, to become part of something unfolding.
